product: Restrict access to AI Functions with Unity Catalog permissions (Public Preview)
tagline: You can now use Unity Catalog permissions to restrict which task specific AI Functions your organization can access, independent of foundation model access.
what_it_does: You can now use Unity Catalog permissions to restrict which task specific AI Functions your organization can access, independent of foundation model access. Contact your account team to enable this feature. important AI Functions Unity Catalog permissions is in Public Preview but requires enablement.
why_it_matters: For example, if you need to govern access based on compliance or data handling requirements.
plain_summary: You can now use Unity Catalog permissions to restrict which task specific AI Functions your organization can access, independent of foundation model access. Contact your account team to enable this feature.
key_takeaway: You can now use Unity Catalog permissions to restrict which task specific AI Functions your organization can access, independent of foundation model access.
